title: Leisure Corridor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Corridor}}
The '''Leisure Corridor''' was a popular trade and tourism [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]]. The route began at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and traveled through the [[Sarin sector/Legends|Sarin]] and [[Parmel sector/Legends|Parmel sectors]], before ending at [[Ebiwaan]].<ref name="P&P">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref> A frequent traveler of this hyperroute was the passenger liner the ''[[Culroon Minstrel]]''. <ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[Ebiwaan]] was originally located in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. With the Leisure Corridor running from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to Ebiwaan, this implies originally the [[Sarin sector/Legends|Sarin]] and [[Parmel sector]] were located between the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-05-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''
*<!-- 1997-02-XX -->''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''
